programme.title: Match Point
programme.desc: At a turning point in his life, a former tennis pro falls for an actress who happens to be dating his friend and soon-to-be brother-in-law.

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A rookie cop is assigned to the 118 Precinct in the same district where he grew up. The Precinct Captain starts receiving letters about two unsolved murders that happened many years ago in the housing projects when the rookie cop was just a kid.

programme.title: Terminal
programme.desc: In the dark heart of a sprawling, anonymous city, Terminal follows the twisting tales of two assassins carrying out a sinister mission (Max Irons & Dexter Fletcher), a teacher battling a fatal illness (Simon Pegg), an enigmatic janitor (Mike Myers)...

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Cinderella gets a tan as the WPT soaks up the fun in the Bahamas with a table full of reckless newcomers and a scorching $3,500,000 prize pool.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In Mississippi it's an epic David vs. Goliath battle as three young guns go up against three of the biggest names in poker for a river of cash – over $5,000,000.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Southern California is rockin' and rollin' as the WPT shakes up Los Angeles with the largest prize pool in west coast history.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Two young people are entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: The Night of the Big Heat
programme.desc: While mainland Britain shivers in the depths of winter, the northern island of Fara bakes in the nineties. The boys at the Met station have no more idea what is going on than the regulars at the Swan.

programme.title: The Young Nurses
programme.desc: Kitty, Michelle and Joanne are lively young nurses who work at a large hospital and give the sexiest treatment you've ever seen in The Young Nurses.

programme.title: Goodbye Lenin!
programme.desc: In 1990, to protect his fragile mother from a fatal shock after a long coma, a young man must keep her from learning that her beloved nation of East Germany as she knew it has disappeared.

programme.title: Paths Of Glory
programme.desc: This powerful, fact-based absurdity-of-war film stars Kirk Douglas as a commanding officer who defends three scapegoats on trial for a failed offensive that occurred within the French Army in 1916.

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian
programme.desc: The tale of Conan the Cimmerian and his adventures across the continent of Hyboria on a quest to avenge the murder of his father and the slaughter of his village.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: Hacker
programme.desc: As a teenage girl, Laura witnessed the arrest of her father, a brilliant hacker. As an adult, Laura has become a hacker to assist in national security.

programme.title: Wicked Ways
programme.desc: A wife, her two-timing husband and a flirting neighbor are unpredictable competitors in a warped game that turns into a life-or-death affair.

programme.title: No Way Home
programme.desc: A paroled murderer returns to the Staten Island home of his youth, where a poignant friendship blossoms with the restrained wife of his temperamental-- and jealous-- brother.

programme.title: Kids From Planet 62F
programme.desc: Four friends find an object with special powers that belongs to two alien kids from the planet 62F. Now they must race to get it back to its rightful owners, but NASA are on their tail and they will stop at nothing to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Futra Days
programme.desc: After undergoing an experimental time travel "process" that sends a man into his future, he investigates the man he has become, by engaging in a romance with his future self's girlfriend in a mind-bending reality.

programme.title: Transference
programme.desc: The wife of a CIA agent seeks the truth, after she discovers that her husband’s accident was part of an inside job.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Dougal Brett's road trains have to haul 1,500 cattle to a market nearly 3,000km away.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A team of truckers, husband and wife Mark and Clare Bolitho, bring their 16-year-old dog all the way to Adelaide; tensions rise at a Perth freight depot.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Isolated community in Australia gets over $3 million worth of power-generating equipment.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: One driver's trip hinges on a single phone call to his mechanic.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A driver hauls over 130 tonnes of freight over 2,000 km in just three days.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Misguided Missal
programme.desc: A 15th century prayer volume disappears from a sealed casket inside a locked safe belonging to an Oxford Don; the supernatural is suspected.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Deadly Gift
programme.desc: A barmaid receives a gift, a music box from a thief, dead ten years. But someone is soon murdered and Colonel March believes the music holds the key.

programme.title: Nails
programme.desc: Recovering after a terrible accident, Dana is exposed to a dark and malevolent spirit who is intent on her destruction. After surviving a near-fatal accident, track coach and mother Dana awakens in hospital, paralysed and imprisoned in her own body.

programme.title: Dementia 13
programme.desc: Shocked by the death of her spouse, a scheming widow hatches a bold plan to get her hands on the inheritance, unaware that she is targeted by an axe-wielding murderer who lurks in the family's estate. What mystery shrouds the noble house?

programme.desc: After a series of murders take place involving prostitutes, Cagney (Meg Foster) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) go undercover in the hopes of finding who keeps killing the women. Also starring Al Waxman, Carl Lumbly, and John Karlen.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: In some cases, the transformation from everyday woman to brutal killer is activated by a man. A boyfriend or husband can become the focus of a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killing Spree
programme.desc: In 1984, in South Florida, a rapist and murderer was on the loose. The killer was a ruthless and terrifying predator, the newest member of an infamous group known as serial killers.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Family Torn
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Good Vs Evil

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Off the Deep End

programme.desc: An adoring and unsuspecting wife discovers her perfect husband is an imposter, a fraudster and a bigamist

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Conman Casanova

programme.desc: Today's hunt takes Dog far from the glittering hotels of Waikiki to the parts of Hawaii tourist rarely see, Oahu's ramshackle tent cities. The team searches for a woman who has lost almost everything, her home, her family and her spirit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Dead of Night
programme.desc: Dog's good friend and fellow bondsman Chris is running out of time. He has only days to find his fugitive or risk losing his business. In his hunt Dog confronts duplicitous tipsters, vicious attack dogs, and hostile neighbors.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man Pt. 1
programme.desc: Dog launches a high stake hunt through the desolate and dangerous mountain landscape of western Colorado in pursuit of a gun-loving survivalist with a million dollar bond on his head. Will Dog's plan of using brains over brawn work?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man Pt. 2
programme.desc: Once in Montrose, Dog discovers that the million dollar fugitive is not the young bondsman's only problem. Dog and Beth make it their mission to both clean up the mess and teach him the fundamentals of bondsmanship.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Inlawful Entry
programme.desc: When Missy's parents visit, her father convinces Jase to take him on a quail hunt. But while their "bonding hunt" yields very few quail, it does bring them closer together as friends. Meanwhile, Willie helps John Luke start his own snow cone business.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Flock and Key
programme.desc: Si recruits his nephews to help him transport a storage container to his backyard, but things take a turn when Jep becomes locked inside the box. Meanwhile, Jase helps Mia prepare for her cheerleading competition, but the only problem is he has no idea.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ball in the Family
programme.desc: When Willie's old rival Phillip McMillan challenges him to a game of dodgeball, Willie recruits his family members to settle a score once and for all. Meanwhile, Si thinks his cat is cheating on him with another family, so he recruits Miss Kay.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drone Survivor
programme.desc: When Jase and Phil make a bet about whether or not human beings in a duck blind are visible from the air, Jep buys a drone copter to get a "bird's eye" view, but ends up losing it in the process.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Alan in Charge
programme.desc: Jase and the guys convince Willie to hire his older brother Alan to work at Duck Commander, but when Alan begins micromanaging everyone, they quickly change their mind. Meanwhile, the ladies take a self-defense class and use John Luke as a punching bag.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Renaissance Men
programme.desc: When the Robertsons throw a Renaissance Fair birthday party for Godwin, various family members compete in a tournament to win knighthood.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Heroes Welcome
programme.desc: In this special episode, the Duck Commander team surprises two wounded veterans with a trip to Monroe so they can be in an episode of Duck Dynasty. To show their support, the Robertson family stages a color run to bring awareness to our wounded soldiers.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Pie Hard
programme.desc: Willie and Alan agree to help Miss Kay open her own bakery, but things take a turn when Kay is asked to hand over her secret recipes. Meanwhile, the guys in the duck call room take an extended lunch break by driving to Mississippi.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Van He'llsing
programme.desc: When Missy and Jase's son Reed purchases an old van to boost his music career, his parents begin to question some of his choices. Meanwhile, Willie helps Jep prepare River for a competitive wrestling league by introducing him to his friend.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Toad to Perdition
programme.desc: When Willie and his brothers spend too much time frog hunting, their wives challenge them to a "frogging" competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: RV There Yet?
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a road trip to Liberty University where they will drop off John Luke and Mary Kate for their first year of college. Along the way, they stop in Nashville to visit Willie's friend Colt Ford.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Amazing Man
programme.desc: A youngster turns to a fantasy world and a comic-book superhero to cope with the pain of his father's death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: All the Colors of the Heart
programme.desc: An athlete who expects to gain his sight must counsel another man who is certain to lose his.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Why Punish the Children?
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark take on a system that keeps inmate mothers and their children apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Dream of Wild Horses
programme.desc: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in some wild horses.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: In With the "In" Crowd
programme.desc: A cop is working undercover at a school to put an end to drug use, but faces suspension because of a mistake Mark has made.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: With Love, The Claus
programme.desc: At Christmastime, Jonathan and Mark try to get a divorced couple to work together for their son's sake. Meanwhile, the holiday may be in jeopardy when a department store Santa is arrested.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Is biological life merely a stepping stone for a universe dominated by alien artificial intelligence?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: UFO Metal: Nations all over the world are rumoured to have found metal debris from UFO crashes. Join the investigation into the alleged wreckages of otherworldly crafts.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Discover how international governments investigate UFO sightings and the secrecy in which they shroud their findings.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Doomsday
programme.desc: There have been doomsday signs and prophecies for centuries, and humans' time on this planet may be nearly over.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: New World Order
programme.desc: An elite group of power-brokers may be trying to rule the planet.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Cloning
programme.desc: Disturbing experiments in animal cloning go on behind closed doors and human cloning may soon be a reality.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Flying Saucer
programme.desc: Discover America's new killer aircraft and the out-of-this-world technology the US military uses to conquer the globe.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Mind Control
programme.desc: There are those who wish to control what others think, how they act and what they believe. Discover the new practices in mind-control.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Haarp
programme.desc: Governments around the world may be using weather control to incite the next World War and possibly destroy the planet.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Alien Wars
programme.desc: Has our government been at war with alien aggressors for the past half century? Startling evidence indicates that the US military has been under attack and has kept it from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Global Depopulation
programme.desc: Disasters, famine and pandemics threaten civilisation on a global scale. A cataclysmic event may spell the end of civilisation and the human race could face extinction.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: Documents may prove that the government has a secret group of remote viewers watching its citizens: the CIA's 'psy ops army'.

programme.title: Dynasty: Sammy Jo and Steven Marry
programme.desc: Nick tells Krystle of his deep feelings for her; Steven and Sammy Jo marry; Fallon cancels her abortion; after the scandal caused by the papparazzi photos of Alexis and Blake, Krystle leaves her husband.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Car Explosion
programme.desc: Nick persuades Krystle to leave Blake; Steven and Sammy Jo announce they are married; Blake is attacked by gangsters and blinded when his car is bombed.

programme.title: Dynasty: Blake's Blindness
programme.desc: Blake remains blinded following the explosion; Nick asks Krystle to divorce her husband and marry him; Blake investigates Nick's past; Alexis is determined to drive Krystle from Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Hearing
programme.desc: Fallon confesses her love to Nick, but he is interested in Krystle; Blake's attempts to bring gangster Logan Rhinewood before a Crime Committee hearing are thwarted; Sammy Jo tells Alexis she knows her secret; Blake receives an anonymous letter.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Iago Syndrome
programme.desc: Krystle says goodbye to Nick and leaves Denver; Blake offers to adopt Jeff; Cecil blackmails Claudia; Nick accepts Blake's explanation of his brother's death.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Hundra & Emily

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Devan & Rylan
programme.desc: For shy Devan, meeting Rylan was love at first click. Devan wants to believe that Rylan is marriage material but her suspicious behaviour is leaving him with doubts. (S4, ep18)

programme.desc: Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasn't come out to her friends and family yet. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nick & Melissa
programme.desc: Nick and Melissa fell in love at age 12 when they met on an online chat room. Now 18, Nick is ready to meet Melissa. But is Melissa the real deal or has Nick been entangled in lies? (S2, ep13)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Keyonnah & Bow Wow

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Caroline

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Legend has it that in the Amazon jungle lies El Dorado, a mythical city of gold. Colonel Percy Fawcett, believed in its existence and spent years searching. In 1925, he vanished with his son and a friend during an expedition revealing a civilization.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1944 Italy, SS soldiers raid an Italian Count's villa under Himmler's orders to find the Germania, an ancient manuscript by Tacitus. Himmler idealized it as the "Book of Power" to prove Aryan superiority, justifying Nazi atrocities.

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Arthur: Grandpa Dave's Memory Album/Buster's Carpool Catastrophe
programme.desc: Grandpa Dave is moving closer to the family, but something isn't quite right--he's forgetting all sorts of things. And Muffy, Arthur and Buster are carpooling to their cooking class. Can they stop fighting and have fun?

programme.title: Military Machines: America in World War II
programme.desc: The US Coast Guard was the first branch of the US military to see action in WWII.

programme.title: Military Machines: America in World War II
programme.desc: The US Coast Guard saw extensive action throughout the Second World War, battling U-boats within sight of mainland America.

programme.title: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: To commemorate the 70th Anniversary of the Battle of Britain Ewan and Colin McGregor take to the skies to discover how; against the odds, the RAF inflicted Hitler's first defeat of WW2.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: A Day of Infamy
programme.desc: December 7th, 1941 Pearl Harbor was attacked by the Empire of Japan. Now the people who were there share their memories of that fateful day.

programme.title: Stories from the Blitz
programme.desc: Stories from the Blitz features new interviews with those who were there and amazing archive footage of the devastation, and of human courage and sheer will to survive one of Britain's darkest periods in History.

programme.title: Guns That Changed The Game: If You Wish For Peace, Prepare For War
programme.desc: If You Wish For Peace, Prepare For War: Small arms production hit a boom in the early 1800s with the emergence of the modern cartridge; an invention that led to the lethal package.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: Destroyers and Cruisers showcases ships that with their speed and firepower became the backbones of 20th century navies. We tell the incredible story of USS Laffey, the WW2 destroyer that would come to be known as ‘the ship that would not die’.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Walking with Witches
programme.desc: Convinced the medieval witch trials were a Judeo-Christian attempt to exterminate the Aryans, Himmler established a special team led by Reinhard Heydrich to build a database of medieval German witchcraft practices.

programme.title: Guns That Changed The Game: The Gods Of War
programme.desc: The Gods of War: The industrial revolution changed it all when it came to cannons as they evolved from wholly inaccurate and immobile to deadly killing machines.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Invasion of Panama
programme.desc: Invasion of Panama: In 1989, 20,000 US troops entered Panama to overthrow military dictator Manuel Noriega and around 500 civilians were killed. What prompted the invasion?

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: As one of their most controversial scientists, Heisenberg was key in the Nazis' efforts to build an atomic bomb. How close was he to achieving his goal?

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: See the marine life and coral formations of the Belize Barrier Reef.

programme.title: Whale Guardian
programme.desc: Join marine biologist Nan Houser’s quest to protect the ocean’s humpback whales.

programme.title: African Bambi
programme.desc: Chase three young gazelles as they navigate the perils of life in the Serengeti.

programme.title: Africa's Wild Horizons
programme.desc: See how an imploded, but isolated, volcano is a home to many key species.

programme.desc: See how life survives in the Liuwa Plains, a wild and harsh habitat in Africa.

programme.title: Tales From Zambia

programme.desc: A matter transporter results in strange happenings including TV reporter April O'Neil being put into a cat-like state and a tiger chasing the Turtles and Splinter, their mentor-rat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Technodrome
programme.desc: To bring the Technodrome back to Earth, Shredder is instructed to take over the Niagara Falls hydroelectric station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beneath These Streets
programme.desc: While the Turtles, in disguise, are at a movie, Shredder interrupts a press conference to steal a new medi-laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on Trial
programme.desc: While the Turtles go on a talk show to prove their innocence to the world, Krang steals a robot and some Solarbenite from a military warehouse, with the intention of destroying the Turtles himself.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the 50-Foot Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are planning Irma's birthday party, Shredder steals an Exaboron Isotope from a meteorite crash. Krang creates an Exaboron-powered Enlarging Ray which causes six times normal growth, with the intention of using it on Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Maltese Hamster
programme.desc: Shredder gives futuristic laser weapons to mobster Tony Vivaldi and his underlings. Shredder wants to find the Maltese Hamster statue of him, which has inside it the formula for ultimate fuel for the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sky Turtles
programme.desc: Krang creates a Gravity Altering Device which causes everyone in the city, including the Turtles, to start floating.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Old Switcheroo
programme.desc: Two huge electrodes at Cybertech Labs produce a startling effect on two long-time foes. The mind of the Turtles master Splinter winds up in the body of the evil Shredder - and vice versa, causing confusion among their associates.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Burne's Blues
programme.desc: Burne is out to prove to April that he can still dig in the trenches and find good stories after deriding her for failing to come up with anything good lately.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Fifth Turtle
programme.desc: On the occasion of a rare conjunction of the Earth, Moon, and Stars, Shredder steals some Capsidium Crystals.

programme.title: Total Drama Action

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: Owen, Heather and Leshawna are greeted by Bridgette and Geoff, who welcome their guests with unreleased videos, behind-the-scenes intrusions, revelation of gossip and unconventional interviews.

programme.title: Total Drama Action

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly wants to learn to dance the mambo to please his lovely she-bear. He finds a learning kit at the ranger's home which has a dance carpet with footprints.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: After receiving a terrible blow on the head, Grizzly thinks he's a rodent and tries to get the gang to adopt him.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is exhausted, and he goes to fetch a pillow and a sleeping mask, but the Lemmings have entirely different plans for the couch.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers that the frenzied breakdance the Lemmings are doing is actually due to the fleas they are infested with.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Another heat wave, and even the riverbed is dried up. One very thirsty Grizzly discovers that the Lemmings have used the last remaining bottles of water to fill their inflatable pool.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have caught a little spider. Her sticky threads are perfect for bungee jumping. Grizzly, who has no intention of getting caught in the web, decides to crush the insect.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over chocolate-spread jar lids, which they use as chips to win goodies. But more importantly, there's a grand prize, a giant jar of Yummy.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy has prepared himself a TV dinner to eat in front of his favourite series, but his moment of pleasure is abruptly interrupted by unexplained static.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings are having a rave party. When Grizzy throws their stereo into the river, he sparks a general power outage and is unable to watch his favourite shows.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he realises that his beloved she-bear adores the smell of flowers, Grizzy decides to offer her the geraniums that decorate the window ledges of the ranger's cabin.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: After making a fool of himself in front of the she-bear, Grizzly is ousted from the cabin by the Lemmings. But Grizzly's luck is about to change.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy can't believe his eyes when he sees objects moving all by themselves. He soon realises it's the Lemmings who are playing around with a magnet.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is persuaded that the she-bear he's in love with has been turned into a frog. Whilst he looks through books of fairy tales, searching for a means to return his beloved to her original form, the Lemmings try to recover the frog.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly discovers a baby raccoon not far from the log cabin. When he sees its big moist eyes, Grizzly melts and adopts the creature. When the Lemmings drag the baby into their dangerous games, the overprotective Grizzly steps in.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers the pleasures of video games on the ranger's console. The Lemmings want to try their hand at the joystick but Grizzy refuses to interrupt his kart racing game.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy builds a look-alike robot to keep the Lemmings away while he prepares a party for his beloved she-bear. But his double's artificial intelligence leaves a lot to be desired.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly's she-bear is convinced she's a lemming after hitting her head. Grizzly believes another well-aimed hit will correct her thinking, but the Lemmings are thrilled to have a new playmate.

programme.title: Bionic Woman

programme.title: Bionic Woman

programme.title: Bionic Woman

programme.title: Bionic Woman

programme.title: Bionic Woman
programme.desc: Jaime sees a woman (Barbara Rush) resembling her dead mother, who Oscar admits was a Department of Defense agent.

programme.title: Bionic Woman

programme.title: Northern Exposure

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A Japanese female terrorist, with American scientists, kidnaps industrialist's son & demands $1.5m ransom. Five-O team races to save boy held in capsule with 52hr air supply before suffocating.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver fights for his life in one of his most awesome adventures as he travels to the sweltering jungles of South America

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver unveils astonishing new tricks of his unusual trade to recover $60million in diamonds that were stolen by an unscrupulous and brilliant con artist.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess take jobs as party coordinators in order to help an orphaned boy and a wealthy family discover what's been missing in all of their lives

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica assumes the role of a freelance reporter to help a father realize the pressure he's putting on his son

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Sanctuary: Awakening

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims find a village cursed with drought by a water monster who demands boy sacrifices. With Monkey’s cloud useless, brave Pigsy volunteers to give his life to save the people.

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey hunts bandits for Lord Li, but discovers they’re not what they seem. Meanwhile, at an inn owned by a wicked dog-woman, Tripitaka faces a dangerous surprise.

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Two killers (John Saxon, Don Stroud) using Whitfield as a hostage want Ironside to help them escape from police headquarters.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Five members of a demolitions detail in World War II get involved in murder; with Antoinette Bower.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A pro football player (Ivan Dixon) stands by his ne'er-do-well brother even when it leads to a manslaughter charge.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside investigates the murder of a guard and the theft of an Italian artwork from a skyscraper exhibition; guest Warren Stevens.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside doubts a folk singer's plunge from the Golden Gate Bridge was suicide; with Guy Stockwell.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside investigates a sudden rise in automobile thefts; with Bernie Hamilton.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: You Call This Plainclothes?
programme.desc: After a series of murders take place involving prostitutes, Cagney (Meg Foster) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) go undercover in the hopes of finding who keeps killing the women. Also starring Al Waxman, Carl Lumbly, and John Karlen.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Under Fire
programme.desc: A series of armored car heists and bloody shoot-outs shocked law enforcement. The brutal violence of the crimes suggested a motive more complex than greed. When the robbers started targeting police, the FBI took charge.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Family Secrets
programme.desc: A woman and her infant son vanish. The husband is frantic. The clues are scarce, but hopes linger, even as the hours and days tick by without a word. Was she on the run, or the victim of foul play?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped, a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Devil's Disciple

programme.desc: A Charles Manson copycat and his henchmen stage home invasions and plot a massacre on Valentine's Day for their own sadistic pleasure

programme.title: Very Bad Men: An Eye For An Eye
programme.desc: A serial killer with a depraved obsession targets Texan prostitutes and surgically removes their eyeballs..

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The High Rolling Reverend
programme.desc: A charismatic Reverend shears more than nine million dollars from his flock of 1,600 churches.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Trained To Kill

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Corridor Killer

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Captured Alive
programme.desc: When a Witt, Texas home is destroyed by fire in 2011, police are unaware that an arson investigation will soon lead them on a statewide hunt for a sexual predator.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Psycho Sailor
programme.desc: A beloved sister and mother is found dead in the icy waters of the Rouge River in Dearborn Heights, MI. Police form a task force to bring down the man who strangled her. In a difficult twist, the killer may be closer to the case than police think

programme.title: The New Detectives: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives: False Witness
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Face Of Tragedy
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scattered Clues
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutalchoosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives: To Kill Again
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child

programme.title: 48 Hours: Texas Confidential
programme.desc: A report on the 1997 murder of Doris Angleton, the wife of a successful Houston, Texas bookie. Doris’ husband Bob who claimed that his brother Roger was Doris’ killer, was tried for the crime in state court and acquitted. But the case did not end there.

programme.desc: Terrifying things begin to happen as a couple renovates an abandoned summer camp. A newly divorced woman takes in a stray dog with some terrifying baggage.

programme.title: My Haunted House
programme.desc: A dangerous entity stalks a pregnant woman in her new house. A single mother discovers a terrifying secret trapped in her son's closet. The shocking eyewitness accounts of terrified people whose dream homes have become nightmares.

programme.title: My Haunted House
programme.desc: A dangerous poltergeist threatens a newly-blended family. A young woman is tormented by visions of her own gruesome death.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I Live With My Wife And Girlfriend
programme.desc: Bill wants his wife to move back in with him and his girlfriend. Then, Courtney confronts her fiancé about his mistress. Plus, Acquanette tells Mike it's her or his rap career!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Holiday Hell Feast
programme.desc: Melody is horrified that her sister, Amanda, is ruining her life by dating a 54 year old biker and loser named Wolf. Today they'll face off against Amanda's entire family!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Extreme Fetishes
programme.desc: Sheene’s got a secret to reveal to Derrick that may threaten their relationship. Tabitha thinks her man TJ might be cheating again. Plus, Xeo and James are going head to head for the same woman.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Bridezillas Attack!
programme.desc: Heather says that her fiancé Bud might cheating with her friend. Summer won't let the love of her life marry her cousin Kelly. Plus, Cherie is here to stop her daughter's wedding.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Honey, I'm Leaving You!
programme.desc: Carla has been cheating on her man with his best friend and his sister! Next, Yvonne will tell her friend Marie that she's been sleeping with her boyfriend. Mary Sue and her secret lover, Cory, are here to confront Mary Sue's boyfriend, Scott.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Cheating Secrets Explode
programme.desc: Watch the sparks fly as Victoria confronts the man who stole her man! Then, can cash strapped Stacy win Janelle back from Big? Will Jamie forgive Mariah for cheating on him?

programme.title: The Pearl of Death
programme.desc: When a valuable pearl with a sinister reputation is stolen, Sherlock Holmes must investigate its link to a series of brutal murders.

programme.title: Pursuit to Algiers
programme.desc: Holmes is recruited to escort the heir to a European throne safely back to his homeland after his father's assassination.

programme.title: Sherlock - Dressed To Kill
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes sets out to discover why a trio of murderous villains, including a dangerously attractive female, are desperate to obtain three unassuming and inexpensive little music boxes.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes invites the good doctor to their first murder investigation.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon challenges the contestants to find culinary inspiration from high fashion by creating a menu for some renowned designers. The winning team is rewarded with a brand-new wardrobe while the losing team stays behind.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: It's the night of the fashion show and some of the chefs become distracted by the models they're cooking for.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants are tasked with preparing food for UFC fighter Tito Ortiz and former boxer Sugar Ray Leonard.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: It's steak night and the contestants must prepare some beef for Chef Ramsey and during a special steakhouse service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: There is chaos during service on steak night, prompting Chef Ramsay to throw one team off the job due to infighting.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The arrival of three special guests, including David Beckham, raises the pressure during service. In the team challenge the chefs must roll dice with letters on them, choosing ingredients starting with the letters they roll.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: In 1957, nine-year-old Peter Boland was on holiday having the time of his life on a remote farm in New Zealand when he simply vanished without a trace. Peter’s older brother Gavin Boland, a self-confessed sceptic, turns to Sensing Murder’s psychics.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Long Way Home
programme.desc: 25-year-old Te Puke woman Judy Yorke was a devoted single mum who adored her kids. When she missed her daughter’s fourth birthday party, her family knew something was terribly wrong and reported her missing.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: 54 year old Simon Buis was savagely beaten and kicked to death in an Auckland park in 1980 by persons unknown. To this day, his killers have evaded capture.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Nine Men's Misery
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Cumberland Library & Monastery in Cumberland, Rhode Island where \\"the practice of silence\\" has been disturbed by a brutal past.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: An Officer and an Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS and 2 special guests investigate the Brunswick Old City Hall where an officer was shot and killedin the 1890's. Will TAPS discover that he's still on duty?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Textbook Case
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to an abandoned school in Barnegat, New Jersey. Could the apparition of a beloved community teacher be luring children inside the building or are other spirits at play?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: 200th Episode: Grant is Back
programme.desc: On this 2 hour special, TAPS celebrates their 200th episode by re-visiting one of their favorite and most haunted locations, Trans-Allegheny Lunatic Asylum and by calling on old friends, Grant, Dustin and Joe.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Phantoms of the Opera
programme.desc: On this special Halloween episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Ohio to investigate the Cincinnati Music Hall, a buildingwhere the hauntingsare as frequent as the performances.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Karen becomes very upset with Andi. Fatima threatens an attorney at the firm. Maurice walks into his home and makes a shocking discovery. (S2, ep18)

programme.title: The Game: Media Blitz
programme.desc: Malik becomes the whopping boy for a cartoonist after making a politically incorrect statement. Things take a change for the worse when Malik tries to make amends and ends up punching the cartoonist.

programme.title: The Game: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Malik fires Tasha as his manager after her failed attempts to resolve an embarrassing situation he was involved in.

programme.title: The Game: Turkey Basting Bitches
programme.desc: Melanie gets a job waitressing at a coffee shop. Meanwhile, Derwin, enjoying his new single superstar status, decides to start dating a new girl, named Raquel.

programme.title: The Game: The Ghost Of Derwin Past
programme.desc: Dionne ditches sympathetic Melanie, who decided to stay in San Diego after learning that Dionne would be spending Christmas alone, after she learns that an endorsement opportunity she pitched for Derwin has been resurrected.

programme.title: The Game: Je-Rome Wasn't Built In A Day
programme.desc: Melanie cautiously agrees to go on a date with a new guy named Jerome at the sky box for the Sabers game.

programme.title: The Game: Take These Vows And Shove 'Em
programme.desc: Kelly takes Brittany and leaves Jason when he refuses to stop taking steroids. Meanwhile, Derwin tries to impress a pretty woman but she sees through his façade and decides to school him on how to treat a lady.

programme.title: The Game: The List Episode
programme.desc: Tasha tries on take on Serena Williams as a client. Meanwhile, Malik schools Derwin on the type of women he should date.

programme.title: The Game: White Men Can't Jump, But They're Definitely Packing
programme.desc: Rick Fox returns. A night of getting acquainted with her co-workers at Irv Smith Management leads to Tasha getting flashed by Lev, one of her co-workers who happens to be white.

programme.title: The Game: The Commitments
programme.desc: As things heat up with Jerome, Melanie decides to pull back, afraid of commitment, but after running into Derwin and his new interest, Melanie decides it's time to commit, but later finds Jerome with another woman.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Interrogator

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Code
programme.desc: Leonard Nimoy becomes a member of the Impossible Missions Force and, as Paris of the IMF, helps crack a vital code by hijacking a plane so the enemy can capture one of the passengers

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Numbers Game
programme.desc: Guest star Mai (cq) Britt is a dangerous obstacle when the IMF sets out to learn the number of her husband's Swiss hank account by convincing him World War III has started on Paramount Television Is "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Controllers (Part 1)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Controllers (Part 2)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: Musical comedy star Sally Ann Howes plays a dramatic role as a guest member of the IMF when it sets out to foil a plot to ruin a friendly country with counterfeit money on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Louisiana Purchase
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Ton and Allen encounter some salty locals at a shipping crate auction, and navigate choppy waters at a boat auction. After spending a lot of cash, they find a tactical blast shield and a bass fishing boat.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Once a Pawn a Time

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock-et to Me!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen end up in a turf war at a Hollywood auction and at odds with each other over whether to gamble on what could be an antique slot machine. Allen attempts to fly a jetpack.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen vs. Ton

programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.desc: Meet two people startled by the return of relatives that refuse to be forgotten.

programme.desc: Meet two people who are especially susceptible to supernatural experiences.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Lake Club Horror
programme.desc: The Lake Club is transformed into a rock n roll nightclub with mysterious happenings.

programme.desc: When Stacy Stowe hears ghostly sounds in her home, she assumes it's the spirit of her late husband who died in a tragic car accident. But a psychic warns Stacy that she will find no peace until she closes the portal that has opened the door for evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Death's Door

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear Feeders
programme.desc: Soon after Al Gonzalez purchases a home outside Fort Wayne, Indiana, he begins to hear strange noises and sees unexplainable shadows. Paranormal investigators determine the entities in Al's home are dangerous and that he is not their first victim.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A year after a popular high school senior goes missing, a witness comes forward claiming to know who is responsible for her disappearance. Detectives must unravel a web of lies in order to learn the truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother-of-two mysteriously disappears after spending the night at a local New Mexico bar. The police race against the clock to hopefully find her alive, and are shocked by what they uncover.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in her home, police aren't sure if it's an accident or a murder until they receive an unexpected phone call, from an unexpected person.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Almost a decade after Californian student Lynsie Ekelund went missing, detectives call the main suspect's bluff when they find human remains at the construction site he worked at.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: In search for an Earthbending teacher for Aang, the kids go to an underground Earthbending tournament where they encounter Toph, a blind, but powerful Earthbender.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Faraway Friend/Arthur and The Square Dance

programme.desc: After agreeing to a co-list in Bel Air, James and David struggle to get a word in edgewise during their showings; Flagg soaks in the waters of Palm Springs as he tries to sell Suzanne Somers' house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: When Fredrik tries to get brokers to his Upper Bel Air property, he faces a huge obstacle: LA traffic; James and David create a decoy to get a sale in Bel Air; Altman negotiates against his brother.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Tracy trades her broker hat for a buyer hat when she starts searching for a home in Beverly Hills and is shocked when she realizes Flagg is listing her dream house; Fredrik pushes to set a record price in Upper Bel Air.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Tracy goes head-to-head with Flagg on his listing in the Flats; in Beverly Hills, Altman falls in love with a midcentury masterpiece; James races to close a deal for Bernard "Harv" Harvey and his wife in the booming Valley market.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Approaching the end of its ten-hour journey from Beijing, British Airways Flight #38 gets hit with double engine failure.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Scandinavian Airlines Flight #751 is mired in snow and slush at Stockholm airport. Within seconds, the engines begin emitting a series of rapid-fire booming noises.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Two hours behind schedule and nearing the end of its 53-minute trip from Newark, New Jersey, Continental Connection Flight #3407 has to fight through a treacherous blizzard.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Just minutes after taking off from New York’s LaGuardia Airport, United Airlines Flight #1549 collides with a flock of birds.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Arriving from Istanbul, Turkish Airlines Flight #1951 is on its final approach to Amsterdam’s Schiphol Airport. In the final seconds of the flight, however, the plane suddenly falls from the sky.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: How will guests react when they check into an unfinished holiday home? Will a power cut lead to dinner in the dark for two restaurant owners in France? And a couple of newly-weds search for their new Spanish home.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Will a couple of newlyweds make a success of their new Spanish bar? Can a new golf course give a French holiday home a niche in the market? And a couple from Surrey consider branching out into a bed & breakfast.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Meet a British couple opening a French campsite. There’s drama at a new fine dining restaurant in Spain, and a water sports enthusiast faces delays with his new business on the beach.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Will a water sports company finally manage to open for business? A new campsite host in France has to learn the art of caravanning, and will a PR push land two restauranteurs in hot water?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: There’s more bad news for a water sport business on the beach and a lull in bookings for a French campsite. Meanwhile, a restaurant on the Costa has to call in reinforcements.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: There are pool problems for the Brit owners of a French campsite, there’s a rude awakening for a couple running a bed & breakfast in the desert programme, and a mix up at a Spanish restaurant puts a big event in jeopardy.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: The Posse is battling with Skor over a crystal near the local airport, when the crystal slips out of both their hands and flies into a suitcase being loaded onto a passenger jet. The Posse springs into action to recover the crystal.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: When Johnny saves a fellow pilot from a fiery crash during a practise run, it leads to a reluctant friendship with the son of Carmone Fontaine, head of the Soaring Heights organized crime syndicate.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Blue’s Back!
programme.desc: Blue Angel continues her duel against an AI whose prime directives are: duel, decimate, delete!

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Base
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid, and get a condensed history of the conflict. Meanwhile, on the moon, Megatron plots to capture the minicons that are now appearing all over earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Runaway
programme.desc: Understanding that the minicons want to be in charge of their own destinies, the kids sneak the new team out of the base. Thrust finds them, but so do the Autobots who save the day. It's agreed the minicons should not be forced to fight.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Meet The Gretch's Parents / Now with 100% More Portal
programme.desc: McGee and Squirt are flabbergasted when Gretchen's parents turn out to be the famous action-star couple, the Gritchersons! The kids discover an interdimensional portal to travel back and forth between parallel Lakebottom dimensions.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Messy Bessie / Nanny Num Nums
programme.desc: The campers build a race car to help Sawyer relive his pro-racing days.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Past, Part 1
programme.desc: Enthusiastic young Sideswipe, Blurr's hero-worshipper, joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him. Wheeljack also arrives on earth, bent on revenge for Hot Shot seemingly abandoning him during a battle on Cybertron.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Big Top Terror / Slimal Fear
programme.desc: The campers summon Armand's old rival, Doofus the clown who vows to destroy the campers.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: The KFDP learns of a MASSIVE CRYSTAL located somewhere in the middle of the desert. Edgar realizes that it’s actually quite a far distance outside of town. The dinos load up their DUV’s and head for an impromptu road trip.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Stage Fright / Frankenfixer
programme.desc: The Bottom Dwellers stage Armand's awful play but a jealous Suzi unleashes a curse on the production.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is disappointed when their trip to the zoo is postponed. Barney tells Baby Bop a tale about keeping your promise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Make Music
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ have fun learning about music, rhythm and musical instruments. Barney introduces many different instruments and BJ dreams of one day becoming a rock 'n roll star. They discover that music gives everyone a happy feelin.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Come Blow Your Horn!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes
programme.desc: Picture this! When Barney shows off his new painting, his friends are inspired to create their own art show. Discovering how to create new colors and draw shapes, Barney and his friends put on a super-dee-duper art show

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney reminds Riff and BJ that Christmas is about more than getting gifts. Barney takes Melanie on a trip to the North Pole to deliver her letter in person.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop forgets to say "please" and "thank you". Riff shares his dream of becoming an inventor.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Fountain of Fun
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play It Safe!
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Day and Night
programme.desc: With a little Barney magic, the children experience the differences between day and night!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Fifth Turtle
programme.desc: On the occasion of a rare conjunction of the Earth, Moon, and Stars, Shredder steals some Capsidium Crystals.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Rat King
programme.desc: April does a story on the rat problem the city is facing, and the Rat King kidnaps her. The Rat King is the leader of all the rats under his form of government known as the Ratocracy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles at the Earth's Core
programme.desc: The Turtles venture down to the Earth's core and discover a lost prehistoric world complete with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Foolish
programme.desc: Emperor Aleister and his daughter Princess Mallory arrive from the small kingdom of Malacuria where there has been a recent discovery of a vast deposit of Lydium - 90, the most powerful source of energy found on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Big MACC
programme.desc: At an army testing lab where a super laser is being demonstrated, the crowd is surprised by the arrival of MACC, a robot from the year 2399 that talks like a cowboy from watching old western movies on inter-dimensional trips.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ninja Sword of Nowhere
programme.desc: Krang detects the existence of an alien metal that could help him conquer the Earth. It happens to be on a Ninja Sword the Turtles have purchased for Splinter as a National Sensei Appreciation Day gift.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): 20,000 Leaks Under the City
programme.desc: Krang is out to liquidate the Turtles by pumping water through the Earth's crust and into the sewer system. The super pump starts sucking up the entire ocean and soon the streets are covered with three feet of water.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Take Me to Your Leader
programme.desc: Leonardo cannot take the pressure of being the leader of the Turtles anymore and leaves. Meanwhile, Krang and Shredder use their Solar Siphon to drain all the energy from the Sun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Four Musketurtles
programme.desc: Leonardo becomes a little soft in the shell after he is knocked on the head. He thinks he is D' Artagan and that the other Turtles are the Three Musketeers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles, Turtles, Everywhere!
programme.desc: The city's new state-of-the-art garbage disposal system's main computer DUMP 1000 is programmed by Shredder to seize the Turtles but starts scooping up every turtle in sight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cowabunga Shredhead
programme.desc: With the aid of the Holographic Synthesizer, Shredder creates an exact likeness of Michelangelo and programs it to invade the Turtles' lair and destroy them.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly's she-bear is convinced she's a lemming after hitting her head. Grizzly believes another well-aimed hit will correct her thinking, but the Lemmings are thrilled to have a new playmate.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When a meteorite falls not far from the log cabin, strange berries start to grow. One of their properties is that they make anyone who eats them grow to disproportionate sizes.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Under the wood floor of the log cabin, Grizzly and the Lemmings discover the entrance to an underground gallery with an old treasure card that indicates the location of a treasure.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he brandishes an Indian sceptre that the Lemmings brought home with other antique objects, Grizzy sees the Lemmings bow low before him and behave like servants.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy tries to impress the she-bear that he's in love with by making a sculpture of her from a piece of wood. But as soon as the artist's back is turned, the Lemmings gnaw at the work of art in order to transform it into a toboggan slide.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings throw a surprise birthday party for one of the clan. When Happy Birthday rings out, the surprise is as great for Grizzly, who is trying to have a nap after a hearty meal, as it is for the birthday Lemming hero in question.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: A gust of wind sweeps away the flower that Grizzly's adored she-bear wears in her hair. Grizzly sees this as a golden opportunity to dazzle her by bringing it back.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds two identical vases that are actually communicating vessels in a Native American Indian chest. If he sticks his hand in one, it comes out the other, regardless of the distance between them.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a vintage stopwatch in the garage which lets one wind back the minute that has just passed by, and it can even stop time and movement in one's surroundings.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is disturbed in the middle of his TV snack by a flow of incongruous objects that have been transformed into hot-air balloons.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers with great delight that the ranger has purchased a brand new multi-function Stressless recliner. But the Lemmings transform it into a fearsome multi-game chair.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message, which makes Po laugh. The Teletubbies watch Mark and Zoe decorate cake with butter icing, chocolate and strawberries.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say hello. They watch a boy and his grandad building a barbecue. A voice trumpet brings a message that makes the Teletubbies laugh and run away.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a group of children play hide and seek. The Teletubbies play their own hiding game. Tinky Winky can’t see Dipsy when he hides, and Laa-Laa can’t see Tinky Winky and Dipsy when they hide.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch an traditional Christmas insert featuring children from a school in Scarborough. They are all busy making snowballs. All the snowballs are different sizes.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy help his mum paint some Rangoli patterns for the festival of Diwali. A decoration appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love jump, but they stop to see Andy Brown and some children take a trip on a boat to see Funghi the Dolphin. The Teletubbies are out in Teletubbyland. When they meet each other, they say hello, making sure no-one is missed out.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun creeping round the column in Home Hill before watching some children doing gymnastics. Laa-Laa plays catch ball indoors with the other Teletubbies, but the Noo-Noo catches the ball first.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The toaster makes an extra piece of Tubby Toast – but who is going to eat it? The Teletubbies watch Emily And Jamie take their dog Jessie for a walk before giving her a bath.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat and Vincent team up with married FBI agents and worry about their own future. JT explores the idea he has powers, Tess considers a career change, and Heather offers to help Cat simplify her life.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat and Vincent visit a couples counsellor as Cat investigates a wealthy transplant recipient linked to mysterious experiments. Tensions rise as they juggle relationship issues with ongoing threats.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat’s new partner raises suspicions that Bob and Carol are back to target her and Vincent. JT discovers his healing ability comes at a cost. Tess and Heather also navigate shifting alliances.

programme.title: Matlock: The Lovelorn

programme.desc: Matlock’s murder defense of Allison Tate, a young heiress with a history of mental instability, is complicated by Warren Kreitzer, a New York lawyer who is responsible for her trust fund.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Pigsy searches for a missing girl, finding she’s married to a slug monster. Disguised as the slug, he lives with vain Hai-Min—until she notices her husband isn’t so slimy after all.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a volcanic land plagued by quakes, a catfish demon and a faceless shape-changer fight. A priest claims one pilgrim is the impostor. Distrust splits the group apart.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims meet a man digging a mountain tunnel for 22 years. Tripitaka insists they help, but Monkey’s magic shortcut angers him. Banished Monkey leaves them vulnerable to grave danger.

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside investigates a sudden rise in automobile thefts; with Bernie Hamilton.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.desc: Brown's affair with a singer (Susan Saint James) comes to a tragic end; with Steve Carlson, Donnelly Rhodes.

programme.desc: Ironside suspects a missing Soviet track star has defected to be with a girl who already defected years before; guest Steve Ihnat.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped, a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.desc: Rev and Justine return from visiting their adopted baby they'll soon be able to call their own. They get the family excited with the news that they will have a new sister living in the house in a few days.

programme.title: Run's House: Mind on the Road
programme.desc: Season Five kicks off when Rev Run home for a short visit in between gigs of his concert tour with good pal, Kid Rock.

programme.title: Run's House: Bonless Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: The episode begins with Rev Run on stage in what is his final performance of his tour with Kid Rock. Rev returns home and his hopes of getting his diet back on track are thwarted by Russy's new cooking hobby.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession
programme.desc: Joan and her boyfriend Tony are seeing apparitions in their New Jersey home. Both are concerned that the spirits are influencing their behavior: a non-drinker, Tony has turned to the bottle while Joan has thoughts of harming herself.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hell's Gate
programme.desc: Ever since Wes and his family moved into their new home in York, PA they've been struggling with a dark force that's made everyday a living hell. Wes feels his mental and physical health is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Glove
programme.desc: When a terrifying haunting threatens to break a Daisytown, PA couple apart, PRS is their last resort. As the investigation deepens, PRS and the family learn that it's just the tip of iceberg, turns out this haunting might be all in the family.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: School House Haunting
programme.desc: PRS travels to Massachusetts to investigate an old schoolhouse where children's voices disturb a couple who've made it their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hostage to Fear
programme.desc: P.R.S. is summoned to help a family who has been haunted for years by spirits lurking in the house. Upon arrival the team finds a family that has become prisoners in their own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghost On the Tracks
programme.desc: PRS is called to a New Jersey beauty salon, but they soon learn that the building's proximity to deadly train tracks might be the true cause of spirit activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Freshmen Fear
programme.desc: A young female student claims to have seen a ghost in her dorm room.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1. The upper floors of Wentworth House are a maze of corridors and rooms and the team have one night to investigate as many as possible. With one whistling spirit, groans and loud noises the team are shaken to their core.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The underbelly of this great house is a sharp contrast to its upper grandeur. Some members of the team are forced to run while other are lost in the labyrinth of tunnels and passageways pursued by something unnatural.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oakwell House
programme.desc: The team investigate Oakwell House near Leeds, which was built by ancestors of Fred Batt. In 1684, William Batt returned unexpectedly from a trip to London but vanished leaving a bloody footprint. A demon dog has been seen in the grounds.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Knottingley Town Hall
programme.desc: This location is said to be overflowing with paranormal activity, which doesn’t disappoint.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Capesthorne Hall
programme.desc: The beauty of this magnificent Cheshire country house hides the horror that lies in its corridors. As well a poltergeist activity the team manage to catch some of their best evidence to date and even our sceptic hears noises.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Witness to Murder, Roulette Wheel, The Phrenologist's Head, The Bridge, The Cigar Box.
